title: isnardia alternifolia var. uniflora
intro: Isnardia alternifolia var. uniflora, also known as the Australian finger lime, is a variety of the Isnardia alternifolia plant, a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant is known for its unique citrus-like flavor and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isnardia alternifolia var. uniflora include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system. Isnardia alterniflora var. uniflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or infused oil, and is often used in culinary and traditional medicine applications.
